skills.name: First Meeting
skills.description: Get to know a brand-new user - a friendly getting-acquainted chat to learn their name, how to address them and what they are into, then save it to the user profile with update_user. Use when the "About the user" document still contains unfilled template placeholders, when you do not know the user's name yet, or when the user introduces themselves for the first time.

skills.name: Cooking Companion
skills.description: Hands-free cooking assistant - find a recipe, walk through it step by step and run kitchen timers by voice. Use when the user wants to cook something, asks for a recipe, needs help in the kitchen or asks for a cooking timer.

skills.name: Language Practice
skills.description: Conversational foreign language practice - everyday spoken dialogue with gentle corrections, a word of the day and progress tracking. Use when the user wants to practice or learn a foreign language, asks to talk in another language or to train vocabulary.

skills.name: Movie Night
skills.description: Recommend movies and TV shows to watch tonight - personalised picks based on the user's tastes and fresh ratings. Use when the user asks what to watch, wants a movie or series recommendation, or is planning a movie night.

skills.name: Daily Briefing
skills.description: Assemble a short spoken morning briefing - current date and time, local weather, top news and the user's reminders. Use when the user asks for a daily briefing, a morning summary, "what's new today", or wants a quick overview to start the day.

skills.name: Focus Sessions
skills.description: Run focused work sessions (Pomodoro style) with spoken check-ins - timed work blocks and breaks driven by reminders. Use when the user wants to focus, start a work or study session, run a Pomodoro timer, or asks for help staying on task.
